independence: Reviewers were separate read-only agents; the implementing Program Director did not review or approve its own work. Consolidation applied the most conservative decision.

findings.evidence: Full diff + tree scan: only .env.example placeholders and ephemeral CI POSTGRES_PASSWORD; RAILWAY_API_TOKEN is a ${{secrets}} reference. No .env/keys committed.
findings.resolution: No action at G-P0. .env remains gitignored; re-verify when product code lands.

findings.evidence: manifest.json/environment.json/SHA256SUMS were UNTRACKED at e160c60 (generated after the implementation commit).
findings.resolution: Evidence pack (manifest.json, environment.json, SHA256SUMS, council + gate records) committed on the branch in the remediation commit; machine re-verified.

findings.evidence: manifest referenced DOCS/gates/GATE_G-P0.md and council-findings.json which did not exist.
findings.resolution: Created DOCS/gates/GATE_G-P0.md, COUNCIL_REVIEW.md and council-findings.json; manifest regenerated to hash them.

findings.evidence: SHA256SUMS had CRLF terminators; `sha256sum -c` failed all entries; .gitattributes lacked a rule for the extensionless file.
findings.resolution: make-evidence-manifest.py now writes LF (newline='\n'); added `SHA256SUMS text eol=lf` to .gitattributes; regenerated and verified `sha256sum -c` PASS.

findings.evidence: Gate record + independent council records absent at review time.
No develop branch; no main branch protection.
findings.resolution: develop branch created and pushed; PR targets develop. Main branch protection attempted via gh API (result recorded in GATE_G-P0.md); if org plan disallows, residual stays in BLK-003 as human/ops action.

findings.evidence: Delivered ci.yml failed GitHub startup (0s) on every push; web/python jobs used job-level if:hashFiles() (invalid pre-checkout); claude-safe had unquoted 'id: ...' plain scalars.
findings.resolution: claude-safe run steps -> block scalars; ci.yml reduced to P0 docs-and-guards (web/python CI deferred to WP-P1-001). Verified GREEN on PR #1 run 27864460551 (pull_request, docs-and-guards pass).

remediation_verification: Deterministic machine re-check (objective findings): `git cat-file` confirms evidence pack tracked on branch; `sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS` PASS; develop branch exists. See GATE_G-P0.md.
unresolved: No STOP/CRITICAL/MAJOR remaining. ADVISORY/backlog items recorded.
